description: Add a comment (or threaded reply) into an already-unpacked .docx directory by appending to its comment parts (comments.xml + extended/ids/extensible parts) and wiring up relationships and content types.
rules: operates on an unpacked dir the caller already produced via the unpack perk
PARENT_ID makes it a reply; the document.xml markers must still be added by the caller
usage: Set UNPACKED_DIR, COMMENT_ID (unique int), COMMENT_TEXT. Optional COMMENT_AUTHOR (default Claude), PARENT_ID (reply). Output: comment.log with the marker snippet to paste into document.xml.
limitation: The vendored core imports defusedxml; if absent the porter records the import error and exits 0 with an empty log (degraded). With defusedxml present it edits the comment parts in place.
